name: Image Resize
description: Resize an image to fit within specified dimensions and file size limits.
doc:
Resize and compress images for API or storage limits.

Controls:
• Max Dimension - scales to fit within this width/height
• Max Size (KB) - compresses to meet file size target
• Quality - JPEG quality (1-100)

Use Cases:
• Prepare images for LLM vision APIs
• Reduce base64 size for database storage
• Optimize images before processing

Behavior:
• Maintains aspect ratio when scaling
• Iteratively adjusts quality to meet size target
• Outputs JPEG for best compression

inputs.name: Image
inputs.description: Base64 image data URL to resize

properties.name: Max Dimension
properties.description: Maximum width or height in pixels (maintains aspect ratio)

properties.name: Max Size (KB)
properties.description: Maximum file size in kilobytes (uses JPEG compression)

properties.name: Quality
properties.description: JPEG quality (1-100). Lower = smaller file, less quality
